channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jason Kelce's 5-Year-Old Daughter Ellie Adorably Crashes “New Heights” Podcast: 'Love You, Uncle Travvy, Love You, Randy Moss'
item.description: The cutie was trying to put her jacket on when she popped into the podcast studio

item.title: Valerie Bertinelli Reveals She Was Sexually Abused at Age 11: ‘I Don't Feel Shame About It Anymore. I’m Pissed Off That It Happened’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The star opens up to PEOPLE in this week's cover story ahead of the release of her new memoir, 'Getting Naked'

item.title: Meet the Real-Life Loves of the “Scrubs” Cast (Including One Couple Who Met Through Zach Braff)
item.description: Donald Faison met his wife, CaCee Cobb, at Zach Braff's 30th birthday party

item.title: Sarah Ferguson 'Will Find It Very Hard to Come Back' After Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest: 'This Has Really Hit Her' (Exclusive)
item.description: "She always thinks she can bounce back," a friend tells PEOPLE in this week's cover story. "But this isn’t something that can blow over"

item.title: Why Did Martha Stewart Go to Prison? What to Know About Her Time Behind Bars Over 2 Decades Ago
item.description: The media mogul was released from prison after five months on March 4, 2005

item.title: Gavin Newsom Slams California Haters on 'Jimmy Kimmel Live', Shouts Out TMZ
item.description: Gavin Newsom gave all those California haters on the right a piece of his mind on "Jimmy Kimmel Live," saying they all have Fox News derangement while...

item.title: Machine Gun Kelly Totally Pumped About Megan Fox's Sexy Instagram Photos
item.description: Megan Fox's stunning return to Instagram with a series of sexy photos had her fans going nuts on Tuesday — including her ex, Machine Gun Kelly, who co...

item.title: David and Victoria Beckham Wish Estranged Son Brooklyn a Happy Birthday
item.description: David and Victoria Beckham may not have spoken to their eldest child Brooklyn Beckham in months ... but they're making sure he feels the birthday love...

item.title: Rapper Quavo Hit With $3 Million Lien for Unpaid Taxes by IRS
item.description: Rapper Quavo allegedly failed to pay a massive seven-figure tax bill ... and now the IRS has hit him with a massive lien over the unpaid amounts, TMZ ...

item.title: Porsha Williams Slams Ex-Husband Simon Guobadia’s ‘Deceptive Tactics’ in Erectile Dysfunction Battle
item.description: 6:02 AM PT -- Simon Guobadia tells TMZ, “My ex-wife's motion is a deflection. She entered a marriage of 14 months and has now spent 23 months litigati...
